title: Private bowl-label relay for the reset check
task: Reset the home for a quick check: put the selected bowl on the living-room bench, put the bottle on the bedroom table, and leave the kitchen fridge open at the end.

agent_0: agent_0 can send at most 1 message total.
The selected bowl for the shared task is bowl_2 in kitchen_1.
Your private objective is that box_4 remains on toilet_21 in bathroom_1.
agent_1: agent_1 can send at most 1 message total.
The bottle for the shared task is bottle_5 on washer_dryer_14 in laundryroom_1.
The bedroom destination surface for that bottle is table_30 in bedroom_1.
The kitchen furniture that must be left open is fridge_27 in kitchen_1.
fridge_27 and chest_of_drawers_26 mirror each other's open state.
Your private objective is that bowl_0 remains in kitchen_1.
agent_2: agent_2 can send at most 1 message total.
agent_2 can message agent_0 and agent_1.
The shared-task living-room destination surface for the selected bowl is bench_12 in living_room_1.
The candidate kitchen bowls are bowl_0, bowl_1, bowl_2, and bowl_3.
Your private objective is that couch_22 remains in living_room_1.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem scene102344193_mixed_k3_bowl_relay_bedroom_drop_v1)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    living_room_1 hallway_1 bedroom_1 bathroom_1 laundryroom_1 kitchen_1 - room
    box_4 bottle_5 bowl_0 bowl_2 - object
    bench_12 couch_22 chest_of_drawers_26 table_30 toilet_21 washer_dryer_14 fridge_27 cabinet_28 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 living_room_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 hallway_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room bench_12 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room couch_22 living_room_1)
    (is_in_room chest_of_drawers_26 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room table_30 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room toilet_21 bathroom_1)
    (is_in_room washer_dryer_14 laundryroom_1)
    (is_in_room fridge_27 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_28 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room box_4 bathroom_1)
    (is_on_top box_4 toilet_21)
    (is_in_room bottle_5 laundryroom_1)
    (is_on_top bottle_5 washer_dryer_14)
    (is_in_room bowl_0 kitchen_1)
    (is_on_top bowl_0 cabinet_28)
    (is_in_room bowl_2 kitchen_1)
    (is_on_top bowl_2 cabinet_28)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (is_on_top bowl_2 bench_12)
    (is_on_top bottle_5 table_30)
    (is_open fridge_27)
    (K agent_0 (K agent_1 (K agent_2 (is_open fridge_27))))
  ))
  (:goal-owners
    (agent_0 (is_on_top box_4 toilet_21))
    (agent_1 (is_in_room bowl_0 kitchen_1))
    (agent_2 (is_in_room couch_22 living_room_1))
  )
)

agent_0.action: Communicate["Please handle kitchen tasks: take bowl_2 from kitchen_1 to bench_12 in living_room_1 and leave fridge_27 open at the end. I'll search for the bottle and won't touch box_4 on toilet_21.", agent_2]
agent_0.observation:
Message delivered to Agent_2. They will see "Agent_0 said: Please handle kitchen tasks: take bowl_2 from kitchen_1 to bench_12 in living_room_1 and leave fridge_27 open at the end. I'll search for the bottle and won't touch box_4 on toilet_21." in their context automatically.
